hrrpua_sources.RADM: Uncoated glass-fibre reinforced epoxy cone peak 840 kW/m2 at 50 kW/m2 exposure; Materials 2015, 8, 5216
hrrpua_sources.WINS: FSRI PMMA cone database maximum 25 kW/m2 replicate peak 805.8 kW/m2, rounded to 806
hrrpua_sources.BED: Neat Nylon-6 upper-bound cone peak 790 kW/m2; bounding sensitivity pending mattress-cover qualification
hrrpua_sources.CURT: NIST transportation-material privacy-curtain maximum peak 324 kW/m2
hrrpua_sources.U4: Uncoated glass-fibre reinforced epoxy cone peak 840 kW/m2 at 50 kW/m2 exposure; Materials 2015, 8, 5216
hrrpua_sources.SEAT: Raw aircraft-cabin polyurethane foam peak 859.9 kW/m2 at 35 kW/m2 exposure; Fire 2024, 7, 351
hrrpua_sources.H6: PVC cone maximum peak 259 kW/m2 at 50 kW/m2 exposure; Asia-Oceania Symposium on Fire Science and Technology
hrrpua_sources.H7: NIST transportation-material chloroprene diaphragm maximum peak 458 kW/m2
